basic_details.job_title: UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 - 828 Posts, Apply Online
basic_details.department: Education Department, Government of NCT of Delhi
basic_details.short_information: UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released a short notice for recruitment to the posts of Principal and Vice-Principal in the Education Department, Government of NCT of Delhi. The notice, issued under Special Advertisement No. 51/2026, was released on 21 July 2026 and announces 828 combined vacancies - 124 for Principal and 704 for Vice-Principal. Online applications can be submitted from 25 July 2026 to 14 August 2026 through the UPSC Online Recruitment Application (ORA) portal at upsconline.nic.in.

important_dates.detailed notification release date: Not available yet - to be released soon

application_fee.details: Female candidates and candidates from SC, ST, or PwD categories are exempted from paying the application fee. All other candidates must pay Rs. 25 online at the time of application submission.

age_limit.details: The age limit for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 differs by post and category. The cutoff date for calculating age is 14 August 2026 . | Post Name Standard Age Limit Age Relaxation Principal 35–50 Years Up to 55 years for SC/ST, up to 53 years for OBC Vice-Principal 35–40 Years Up to 40 years for SC/ST, up to 38 years for OBC | Age relaxation will be applied as per the applicable government rules. Candidates can use an online age calculator to check their eligibility against the cutoff date.

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Master's Degree + Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) + 10 years of teaching experience as PGT or TGT
Master's Degree + Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) + 2 years' experience as PGT, or 3 years' experience as TGT

qualification.details: Eligibility for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 is based on educational qualification, teaching experience, and age limit, as summarized below. Nationality and other general eligibility conditions have not been specified in the short notice and are expected in the detailed notification. | The age limit for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 differs by post and category. The cutoff date for calculating age is 14 August 2026. | Age relaxation will be applied as per the applicable government rules. Candidates can use an online age calculator to check their eligibility against the cutoff date.

salary_details.details: The official short notice for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 does not mention the pay scale or salary for either post. This section will be updated as soon as the detailed notification confirming the pay level is released.

selection_process: The selection process for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 involves the following stages:
Shortlisting Criteria / Recruitment Test Personal Interview Document Verification
or number of questions for the recruitment test has not been specified in the short notice and will likely be detailed in the official notification.
how_to_apply: Candidates can apply online for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 by following these steps:
Visit the official UPSC Online Recruitment Application (ORA) portal at upsconline.nic.in.
Complete the One-Time Registration (OTR), or log in directly if already registered.
Go to the active advertisements section and select the Principal/Vice-Principal notification (Special Advertisement No. 51/2026).
Fill out the online application form with accurate personal and educational details.
Upload scanned copies of the required documents, certificates, and photograph within the specified size limits (maximum 1 MB and 2 MB, as applicable).
Pay the prescribed application fee, if applicable, through net banking, debit/credit card, or SBI cash mode.
Submit the final application form and save/print the confirmation page for future reference.
important_instructions: Applications can be submitted online only from 25 July 2026 (12:01 AM) to 14 August 2026 (11:59 PM). The age limit and other eligibility conditions are calculated as of the cutoff date, 14 August 2026. Candidates should review their educational qualification and teaching experience carefully before applying, as this recruitment requires specific PGT/TGT teaching experience. The detailed notification, which is expected to carry additional eligibility conditions, exam pattern, and document requirements, has not been released yet. Candidates are advised to check the official website regularly for updates. Only the fee categories and amounts confirmed in the short notice (Rs. 25 for UR/OBC/EWS male candidates; nil for SC/ST/PwD/female candidates) should be relied upon until the detailed notification is out.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 notice announces a combined total of 828 vacancies, split between the two posts as follows: A category-wise (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS) breakup of these 828 posts has not been published in the short notice . This will be updated once the detailed notification or vacancy annexure is released.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Eligibility for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 is based on educational qualification, teaching experience, and age limit, as summarized below. Nationality and other general eligibility conditions have not been specified in the short notice and are expected in the detailed notification. The age limit for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 differs by post and category. The cutoff date for calculating age is 14 August 2026 . Age relaxation will be applied as per the applicable government rules. Candidates can use an online age calculator to check their eligibility against the cutoff date.

rows.qualification: Master's Degree + Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) + 10 years of teaching experience as PGT or TGT
Master's Degree + Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) + 2 years' experience as PGT, or 3 years' experience as TGT

rows.age_relaxation: Up to 55 years for SC/ST, up to 53 years for OBC
Up to 40 years for SC/ST, up to 38 years for OBC

content_sections.heading: Salary
content_sections.text: The official short notice for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 does not mention the pay scale or salary for either post. This section will be updated as soon as the detailed notification confirming the pay level is released.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Female candidates and candidates from SC, ST, or PwD categories are exempted from paying the application fee. All other candidates must pay Rs. 25 online at the time of application submission.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 involves the following stages: Shortlisting Criteria / Recruitment Test Personal Interview Document Verification The exact weightage, exam pattern, or number of questions for the recruitment test has not been specified in the short notice and will likely be detailed in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: The short notice does not list the exact documents required for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026. Based on the application process described, candidates should be prepared to upload scanned copies of certificates and photographs within the following size limits once the application form opens: Photograph/signature or similar modules: Maximum 1 MB Other supporting documents: Maximum 2 MB A specific checklist (educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate, etc.) has not been published yet and will be added once available.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications can be submitted online only from 25 July 2026 (12:01 AM) to 14 August 2026 (11:59 PM). The age limit and other eligibility conditions are calculated as of the cutoff date, 14 August 2026. Candidates should review their educational qualification and teaching experience carefully before applying, as this recruitment requires specific PGT/TGT teaching experience. The detailed notification, which is expected to carry additional eligibility conditions, exam pattern, and document requirements, has not been released yet. Candidates are advised to check the official website regularly for updates. Only the fee categories and amounts confirmed in the short notice (Rs. 25 for UR/OBC/EWS male candidates; nil for SC/ST/PwD/female candidates) should be relied upon until the detailed notification is out.

faq.question: Q1. When was the UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026 notification released?
faq.answer: The short notice was released on 21 July 2026 under Special Advertisement No. 51/2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 828 total vacancies - 124 for Principal and 704 for Vice-Principal.

faq.question: Q3. When can candidates start applying online?
faq.answer: Online applications open on 25 July 2026 at 12:01 AM and close on 14 August 2026 at 11:59 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Principal and Vice-Principal posts?
faq.answer: Principal requires a Master's Degree, B.Ed, and 10 years of teaching experience as PGT or TGT. Vice-Principal requires a Master's Degree, B.Ed, and 2 years of experience as PGT or 3 years as TGT.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: For Principal, the age limit is 35–50 years (relaxable up to 55 years for SC/ST and 53 years for OBC). For Vice-Principal, it is 35–40 years (relaxable up to 40 years for SC/ST and 38 years for OBC), calculated as of 14 August 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for female candidates?
faq.answer: No. Female candidates, along with SC, ST, and PwD candidates of all categories, are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for other categories?
faq.answer: UR, General, OBC, and EWS male candidates must pay Rs. 25 online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a shortlisting criteria/recruitment test, a personal interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for Principal and Vice-Principal posts?
faq.answer: The salary has not been mentioned in the official short notice. This will be updated once the detailed notification is released.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates apply for UPSC Principal and Vice-Principal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the UPSC ORA portal at upsconline.nic.in.
